blockers.requiredInput: Run preview/backup, then type REBUILD COMMUNITY, REBUILD CLAN or REBUILD TSBTR in Discord.
blockers.why: Required by the owner's own safety specification.

blockers.requiredInput: Complete the test-guild live workflow first and measure the permissions actually exercised.
blockers.why: Administrator permission is allowed only in the test server.

blockers.requiredInput: Obtain bot authorization and permission in the external server or use an approved API/data feed.
Real member/referee/manager test accounts must press the buttons and exercise role hierarchy.
blockers.why: A single bot runtime cannot truthfully validate every human permission boundary alone.
